center of grille, vertical orientation (reads bottom-to-top from viewer's left to right)

grille_lights.arrangement: vertical pairs, staggered in three rows

main_headlights.position: outermost sections, two per side (both left and right lower corners)

front_geometry.headlight_description: main headlight units in two stacked rectangular shapes per side, integrated into the cab front on left and right sides
front_geometry.bumper_description: dark bumper spanning width, clean design with integrated lower step

no additional badges/text not visible in provided image
